summary: Maeda has explicitly flipped bullish in his most recent video, declaring that the market bottom is in and anticipating higher Bitcoin prices.
narrative: After spending late 2025 and early 2026 profitably shorting Ethereum, his latest analysis marks a major trend shift where he argues the market is bottoming. He highlights STRC as a potential catalyst for marginal buying and criticizes standard 4-year cycle theories, suggesting a new framework confirms the worst is over.

tweets.text: 🎬 Closed my ETH Short. What’s Next for Crypto?
🎬 Why I’m Short $1.5M of ETH (It’s So Over)
